Business.title: Business
Business.description: Comprehensive details for a business listing, serving as the core entity for the directory platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

nameEn.description: The English name of the business.

nameAr.description: The Arabic name of the business.

descriptionEn.description: A detailed English description of the business.

descriptionAr.description: A detailed Arabic description of the business.

categoryIds.description: References to Categories this business belongs to. (Relationship: Category N:N Business)

tagIds.description: References to Tags/Services associated with this business. (Relationship: Tag N:N Business)

addressEn.description: The English street address of the business's main location.

addressAr.description: The Arabic street address of the business's main location.

geoLat.description: The latitude coordinate of the business's main location.

geoLng.description: The longitude coordinate of the business's main location.

areaId.description: Reference to the geographical LocationArea where the business is located. (Relationship: LocationArea 1:N Business)

phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the business.

whatsapp.description: A WhatsApp contact number for the business, if available.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the business.

website.description: The official website URL for the business.

socialLinks.description: A list of social media links for the business.

openingHours.description: Structured weekly opening hours for the business, encoded as a string (e.g., JSON or iCalendar format) for flexibility.

priceRange.description: An indicator of the business's price range (e.g., '$', '$$', '$$$').

attributes.description: A list of specific features or amenities offered by the business (e.g., 'parking', 'delivery', 'wheelchair access').

photoUrls.description: URLs to images/photos of the business stored in Firebase Storage.

verifiedStatus.description: Indicates if the business listing has been officially claimed and verified.

verificationMethod.description: The method used to verify the business (e.g., 'email_domain', 'document_upload', 'phone_otp', 'admin_override').

sourceAttributions.description: A list of data sources contributing to this business listing, including last fetch times and license terms.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this business listing was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this business listing was last updated.

lastVerifiedAt.description: Timestamp when this business listing was last verified, if applicable.

viewCount.description: The total number of times this business profile has been viewed. (Computed safely).

favoriteCount.description: The total number of times this business has been added to user favorites. (Computed safely).

status.description: The current operational status of the business listing (e.g., 'active', 'suspended', 'removed').

statusReason.description: Optional reason for the current status, if not 'active'.

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the business owner who claimed this listing. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 Business)

Branch.title: Branch
Branch.description: Represents an additional physical location or branch for a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Branch entity.

businessId.description: Reference to the main Business entity this branch belongs to. (Relationship: Business 1:N Branch)

nameEn.description: The English name of the branch, if different from the main business.

nameAr.description: The Arabic name of the branch, if different from the main business.

addressEn.description: The English street address of the branch.

addressAr.description: The Arabic street address of the branch.

geoLat.description: The latitude coordinate of the branch's location.

geoLng.description: The longitude coordinate of the branch's location.

areaId.description: Reference to the geographical LocationArea where the branch is located. (Relationship: LocationArea 1:N Branch)

phone.description: The contact phone number for this specific branch.

whatsapp.description: A WhatsApp contact number for this specific branch.

email.description: The contact email address for this specific branch.

website.description: The website URL for this specific branch, if different from the main business.

openingHours.description: Structured weekly opening hours for this specific branch, encoded as a string (e.g., JSON or iCalendar format) for flexibility.

photoUrls.description: URLs to images/photos specific to this branch.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this branch listing was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this branch listing was last updated.

status.description: The current operational status of the branch listing (e.g., 'active', 'suspended', 'removed').

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Defines a classification category for businesses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

nameEn.description: The English name of the category.

nameAr.description: The Arabic name of the category.

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the category.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon representing the category.

parentCategoryId.description: Reference to a parent Category for hierarchical classification. (Relationship: Category 1:N Category)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this category was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this category was last updated.

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Represents a searchable tag, service, or attribute that can be associated with businesses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tag entity.

nameEn.description: The English name of the tag/service.

nameAr.description: The Arabic name of the tag/service.

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the tag.

categoryId.description: Reference to a Category, indicating this tag is particularly relevant to it. (Relationship: Category 1:N Tag)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this tag was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this tag was last updated.

LocationArea.title: LocationArea
LocationArea.description: Defines a geographical area or zone for filtering and organization, specific to Qatar.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LocationArea entity.

nameEn.description: The English name of the location area (e.g., 'Al Sadd', 'West Bay').

nameAr.description: The Arabic name of the location area.

cityEn.description: The English name of the city this area belongs to (e.g., 'Doha').

cityAr.description: The Arabic name of the city this area belongs to.

countryEn.description: The English name of the country (always 'Qatar').

countryAr.description: The Arabic name of the country (always 'قطر').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this location area was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this location area was last updated.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores application-specific profile data for users, distinct from Firebase Authentication data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the UI ('en' for English, 'ar' for Arabic).

roleIds.description: References to UserRoles assigned to this user, enabling role-based access control. (Relationship: UserRole N:N UserProfile)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this user profile was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this user profile was last updated.

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description: Defines the different roles a user can have within the application for access control.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserRole entity (e.g., 'guest', 'registered_user', 'business_owner', 'moderator', 'admin').

nameEn.description: The English display name of the role.

nameAr.description: The Arabic display name of the role.

descriptionEn.description: A detailed English description of the role's permissions and responsibilities.

descriptionAr.description: A detailed Arabic description of the role's permissions and responsibilities.

BusinessClaim.title: BusinessClaim
BusinessClaim.description: Manages the workflow for a business owner to claim ownership of a business listing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BusinessClaim entity.

businessId.description: Reference to the Business entity being claimed. (Relationship: Business 1:N BusinessClaim)

claimerUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the user initiating the claim. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N BusinessClaim)

claimDate.description: Timestamp when the claim was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the claim (e.g., 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'revoked').

approvalDate.description: Timestamp when the claim was approved or rejected.

approverUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the moderator/admin who processed the claim. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N BusinessClaim)

verificationDetails.description: JSON string containing details relevant to the verification method (e.g., email address, document URL).

rejectionReason.description: Reason provided if the claim was rejected.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this claim record was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this claim record was last updated.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Stores user-submitted reviews and ratings for businesses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

businessId.description: Reference to the Business entity being reviewed. (Relationship: Business 1:N Review)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the user who submitted the review. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Review)

rating.description: The star rating given by the user (1 to 5).

comment.description: The textual comment provided by the user in the review.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this review was submitted.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this review was last updated (e.g., after moderation).

status.description: The current status of the review (e.g., 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected').

moderatorNotes.description: Internal notes from moderators regarding the review.

flagged.description: Indicates if the review has been flagged for moderation or reported by another user.

UserList.title: UserList
UserList.description: Allows registered users to create and manage lists of businesses, including favorites.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserList entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the user who owns this list. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserList)

name.description: The name of the list (e.g., 'My Favorites', 'Restaurants to Try').

description.description: An optional description for the list.

businessIds.description: References to Business entities included in this list. (Relationship: Business N:N UserList)

isFavoriteList.description: Indicates if this is the user's default 'Favorites' list.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this list was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this list was last updated.

IngestionSource.title: IngestionSource
IngestionSource.description: Configuration details for an external data source from which business information is ingested.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IngestionSource entity.

name.description: A human-readable name for the data source (e.g., 'Qatar Tourism API', 'Doha Business Directory Feed').

baseUrl.description: The base URL or endpoint for the data source.

robotsTxtPolicyUrl.description: URL to the robots.txt file, if applicable for crawling.

termsOfServiceUrl.description: URL to the terms of service or data licensing agreement for the source.

allowedPaths.description: Array of paths (e.g., regex patterns) explicitly allowed for crawling or API access.

disallowedPaths.description: Array of paths (e.g., regex patterns) explicitly disallowed for crawling or API access.

rateLimit.description: The maximum number of requests allowed per time unit to prevent abuse.

rateLimitTimeUnit.description: The time unit for the rate limit (e.g., 'second', 'minute', 'hour', 'day').

authKeysVaultRef.description: A reference to where authentication keys/credentials for this source are securely stored (e.g., Google Secret Manager ID).

attributionRequirements.description: Text describing any specific attribution requirements for using data from this source.

status.description: The current operational status of the ingestion source (e.g., 'active', 'paused', 'disabled').

lastRunAt.description: Timestamp of the last successful ingestion job for this source.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this ingestion source configuration was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this ingestion source configuration was last updated.

IngestionJob.title: IngestionJob
IngestionJob.description: Records details and status of each scheduled or manual data ingestion execution.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IngestionJob entity.

sourceId.description: Reference to the IngestionSource that this job is processing. (Relationship: IngestionSource 1:N IngestionJob)

startTime.description: Timestamp when the ingestion job started.

endTime.description: Timestamp when the ingestion job finished.

status.description: The current status of the ingestion job (e.g., 'pending', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled').

recordsProcessed.description: The total number of records processed during this job.

recordsAdded.description: The number of new business records added during this job.

recordsUpdated.description: The number of existing business records updated during this job.

recordsSkipped.description: The number of records skipped due to issues (e.g., duplication, invalid data, compliance).

errorMessage.description: Details of any error encountered if the job failed.

logsUrl.description: URL to detailed logs for this ingestion job (e.g., Cloud Logging link).

scheduledBy.description: Indicates who or what triggered the job (e.g., 'system_scheduler', 'admin_userId').

triggerType.description: The type of trigger for the job (e.g., 'scheduled', 'manual', 'webhook').

RawSourceRecord.title: RawSourceRecord
RawSourceRecord.description: Metadata about a raw data payload ingested from a source, with a pointer to its storage location for traceability.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RawSourceRecord entity.

sourceId.description: Reference to the IngestionSource from which this record originated. (Relationship: IngestionSource 1:N RawSourceRecord)

businessIdentifierInSource.description: The unique identifier for the business within its original source system.

fetchedAt.description: Timestamp when the raw data was fetched from the source.

storagePath.description: The URI path to the raw data payload stored (e.g., in Firebase Storage or Cloud Storage).

contentType.description: The content type of the stored raw data (e.g., 'application/json', 'text/html').

processedStatus.description: The processing status of this raw record (e.g., 'pending', 'processed', 'skipped', 'error').

processedTimestamp.description: Timestamp when this raw record was last processed.

errorDetails.description: Details of any error encountered during processing of this raw record.

businessId.description: Reference to the Business entity created or updated from this raw record, if successful. (Relationship: Business 1:N RawSourceRecord)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this raw source record metadata was created.

ChangeRequest.title: ChangeRequest
ChangeRequest.description: Captures proposed edits or new business listing submissions from users or automated systems for moderation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChangeRequest entity.

businessId.description: Reference to the Business entity that this change request applies to. Null if it's a new listing submission. (Relationship: Business 1:N ChangeRequest)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the user who submitted the change request. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ChangeRequest)

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the change request was submitted.

proposedChanges.description: A JSON string representing the proposed changes (e.g., a diff or an object of new field values).

status.description: The current status of the change request (e.g., 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'withdrawn').

moderatedByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the moderator/admin who processed this request. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ChangeRequest)

moderatedAt.description: Timestamp when the change request was moderated.

moderatorNotes.description: Internal notes from moderators regarding the change request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this change request record was first created.

ModerationQueueItem.title: ModerationQueueItem
ModerationQueueItem.description: Represents an item awaiting review in the moderation queue, referencing various types of entities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ModerationQueueItem entity.

entityType.description: The type of entity being moderated (e.g., 'ChangeRequest', 'Report', 'BusinessClaim', 'Review').

entityId.description: Reference to the ID of the entity awaiting moderation.

status.description: The current status of the queue item (e.g., 'pending', 'in_review', 'completed').

assignedToUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the moderator currently assigned to this item. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ModerationQueueItem)

priority.description: Numerical priority level for this item (e.g., 1 for high, 5 for low).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this moderation queue item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this moderation queue item was last updated.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Stores user-submitted reports regarding inappropriate content or incorrect business information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Report entity.

reportedEntityType.description: The type of entity that is being reported (e.g., 'Business', 'Review', 'User').

reportedEntityId.description: Reference to the ID of the specific entity being reported.

reportingUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the user who submitted the report. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Report)

reportReason.description: The primary reason for the report (e.g., 'incorrect_info', 'spam', 'offensive_content', 'duplicate').

description.description: Detailed explanation provided by the user about the report.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the report was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the report (e.g., 'pending', 'under_review', 'resolved', 'dismissed').

moderatedByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the moderator/admin who handled the report. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Report)

moderatedAt.description: Timestamp when the report was handled by a moderator.

resolutionAction.description: The action taken to resolve the report (e.g., 'corrected', 'removed', 'contacted_user', 'no_action_needed').

moderatorNotes.description: Internal notes from moderators regarding the report resolution.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this report record was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this report record was last updated.

definition.description: Main collection for business listings. Publicly readable for active businesses. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' for security rules checks for business owners. 'status' field enables QAP for public access.

params.name: businessId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Business document.

definition.description: Collection for business branches. Stored as a top-level collection for query flexibility. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' from the parent Business for authorization independence, allowing business owners to manage their branches without hierarchical security rule dependencies. Publicly readable for active branches.

params.name: branchId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Branch document.

definition.description: Global lookup collection for business categories. Publicly readable by all users. CRUD operations restricted to admin roles.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Category document.

definition.description: Global lookup collection for searchable tags/services. Publicly readable by all users. CRUD operations restricted to admin roles.

params.name: tagId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Tag document.

definition.description: Global lookup collection for geographical areas. Publicly readable by all users. CRUD operations restricted to admin roles.

params.name: areaId
params.description: Unique identifier for a LocationArea document.

definition.description: Stores application-specific user profiles. Access is restricted to the owner (matching 'userId' in path and 'request.auth.uid') and admin roles. The 'roleIds' field is for backend logic; actual role-based access control relies on the 'roles' collections.

params.name: userId
params.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile document, matching Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Subcollection for user-specific lists of businesses (e.g., favorites). Access is strictly restricted to the owner specified by 'userId' in the path, ensuring path-based ownership and easy QAPs.

params.name: userId
params.description: Unique identifier for the owning UserProfile.

params.name: listId
params.description: Unique identifier for a UserList document.

definition.description: Database-backed access control (DBAC) collection for administrators. The existence of a document at `/roles/admin/{request.auth.uid}` grants administrative privileges in security rules. Admin-only CRUD.

params.name: adminUid
params.description: Firebase Auth UID of a user with administrator privileges.

definition.description: Database-backed access control (DBAC) collection for moderators. The existence of a document at `/roles/moderator/{request.auth.uid}` grants moderator privileges in security rules. Admin-only CRUD.

params.name: moderatorUid
params.description: Firebase Auth UID of a user with moderator privileges.

definition.description: Manages business claim requests. Accessible by the 'claimerUserId', and by admin/moderator roles. The 'status' field defines the workflow stage. No hierarchical dependencies for security rules due to 'claimerUserId' being directly on the document.

params.name: claimId
params.description: Unique identifier for a BusinessClaim document.

definition.description: Stores user reviews for businesses. Publicly readable for 'approved' reviews ('status' field for QAP). Includes denormalized 'businessOwnerId' from the associated Business for authorization independence, allowing business owners to manage reviews for their businesses. User can only CRUD their own reviews via 'userId'.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Review document.

definition.description: Admin-only collection defining external data ingestion sources. Critical for the data pipeline, with access strictly limited to admin roles.

params.name: sourceId
params.description: Unique identifier for an IngestionSource document.

definition.description: Subcollection tracking individual data ingestion job executions for a specific source. Admin-only access. Nested to provide logical grouping and allow targeted administration of ingestion activities.

params.name: sourceId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent IngestionSource.

params.name: jobId
params.description: Unique identifier for an IngestionJob document.

definition.description: Subcollection storing metadata and pointers to raw ingested data payloads. Admin-only access for traceability and compliance. Nested under IngestionSource for clear lineage.

params.name: sourceId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent IngestionSource.

params.name: recordId
params.description: Unique identifier for a RawSourceRecord document.

definition.description: Stores user-submitted changes or new business listings awaiting moderation. Accessible by the 'userId' (submitter) and by admin/moderator roles. The 'status' field dictates the workflow stage.

params.name: changeRequestId
params.description: Unique identifier for a ChangeRequest document.

definition.description: A centralized queue for items requiring moderator review (e.g., ChangeRequests, Reports, BusinessClaims, Reviews). Accessible by admin/moderator roles. An item can be assigned to a specific moderator ('assignedToUserId') for direct access, aiding QAPs for assigned work.

params.name: queueItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for a ModerationQueueItem document.

definition.description: Captures user-submitted reports about content or data issues. Accessible by the 'reportingUserId' and by admin/moderator roles. The 'status' field tracks the resolution workflow.

params.name: reportId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Report document.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for QatarPulse prioritizes security, scalability, and debuggability by strictly adhering to the core design principles. 

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** This is achieved primarily through strategic denormalization. For entities like `Branch` and `Review` that are logically nested but are stored as top-level collections (for query flexibility and to avoid subcollection limitations), we denormalize the `ownerId` from the parent `Business` into the `Branch` document as `ownerId`, and `businessOwnerId` into the `Review` document. This allows security rules to check ownership directly on the document being accessed (`resource.data.ownerId == request.auth.uid` or `resource.data.businessOwnerId == request.auth.uid`) without requiring expensive and complex `get()` calls to parent documents. This also ensures atomic operations for creation/updates without rule failures due to eventual consistency of parent data.

**Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):** Collections are designed such that all documents within a given collection share the same primary security requirements. For instance:
*   Publicly readable data (e.g., `/businesses`, `/categories`, `/tags`, `/location_areas`) are top-level collections, with public read access typically filtered by an explicit `status` field (e.g., `status: 'active'`, `status: 'approved'`).
*   User-specific private data (e.g., `UserProfile`, `UserList`) is segregated under `/users/{userId}/...`, relying on path-based ownership (`request.auth.uid == userId`).
*   Admin/Moderator-only data (e.g., `/ingestion_sources`, `/business_claims`, `/moderation_queue`, `/reports`) resides in dedicated collections, accessible only to users with the appropriate roles as defined in `/roles/{role}/{uid}` collections.

**DBAC (No Custom Claims):** User roles are managed via top-level 'existence' collections: `/roles/admin/{uid}` and `/roles/moderator/{uid}`. This allows security rules to perform simple, efficient `exists()` checks to determine a user's role, avoiding the complexity and potential latency of reading complex arrays in `UserProfile` documents or relying on custom claims.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** Structural segregation directly supports Query Authorization Patterns. By separating public from private data, and active from pending/rejected items via `status` fields, the client can issue queries (e.g., `/businesses?status=active`) that are implicitly secure. The rules enforce that only 'active' or 'approved' items are returned for public queries, eliminating the need for complex, inefficient server-side filtering by security rules. For user-owned data, the `/users/{userId}/user_lists` structure ensures that a user can only query their own lists, satisfying QAPs for private data.

**Invariants and Data Clarity:** Critical fields like `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, and `status` are consistently applied. Wildcards (`{businessId}`, `{userId}`) are descriptive, enhancing readability and debuggability of rules. The use of explicit `status` fields provides a clear finite state machine for entities, making intent explicit and avoiding ambiguous boolean flags. The `ownerId` and `businessOwnerId` denormalized fields explicitly capture ownership for authorization purposes.
